{{Quote|Shamed ones are cursed by the gods, they work as slaves, they are not worth speaking of.|Vua Rapuung|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest" />}}
The '''Shamed Ones''' were [[Yuuzhan Vong]] who were a [[Yuuzhan Vong castes|caste]] all of their own. The Shamed Ones were "imperfect" in some way, having failed in another caste, had their bodies reject implants, committed heresy, or were simply physically deformed. Though part of the [[worker caste]], they were held in contempt even by those members. They were held to be rejected by the rest of the gods, and the only deity they could worship was [[Yun-Shuno]]. To be present at a ceremony of religious importance was held to be a great insult to the god in question.

After the Yuuzhan Vong attack on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], and the redemption of [[Vua Rapuung]], the Shamed Ones came to believe that [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] was the remains of [[Yun-Yuuzhan]], and that the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] were connected with the Yuuzhan Vong. The [[Jeedai heresy|''Jeedai'' heresy]] was formed, and [[Nom Anor]] assumed the guise of the prophet [[Nom Anor|Yu'shaa]], preaching that the arrival of [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] would herald the end of the Shamed Ones' oppression. They rose up against [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]] and the [[Warrior caste]], and the chaos they caused was vital in the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]]. After the war's end, the Shamed Ones were renamed the [[Extolled]].
